string 2:
Ah, good to see you again. Upon my word as a knight,
I have arrived at the rendezvous point.

By the way, I have not seen LordKnightmon yet. He said he
would be heading here soon...
{next}That is a little worrying.
{next}Where did LordKnightmon go?
{end}Well, see you later.

There was mention of an investigation, but I wonder if
something has gone amiss...

I heard something about an investigation in some "Akihabara"
place in the human world...
Very well. Take care of yourself.

If you happen to find yourself in Akihabara, please keep an
eye out for LordKnightmon.

I wonder if the investigation has run into trouble. Please
look into the matter for me.
Ungh, what have I done...? I've met with abject failure...
{next}Hey, cheer up.
{next}What happened?
{end}[I should leave it alone.]

You wish to offer me encouragement? I see that your soul is
one of uncommon beauty.

You care about me enough to ask...? Yes, I suppose I can
share with you my situation.
Urk... What should I do...?

Please listen to my tale of woe. I came to Akihabara as part
of an investigation.

However, the Knight Corps which accompanied me suddenly
stopped obeying my orders!

They were getting out of control, so I locked them up inside
this space for now.
{next}Why did they stop obeying you?
{next}Why did you bring the Knight Corps along?
{next}Are these knights your subordinates?

Honestly, I have no idea. It seemed like suddenly they
didn't recognize me anymore...

Because all of them are beautiful, myself included. They are
my proud knights.

Indeed. They are my loyal subordinates. I trusted them, too,
so I brought them along.

I have them locked up for now, but I wonder how long I can
keep them under control...

I thought I saw a familiar face. It is unlike you to look so
down.

Kentaurosmon! Oh... How unfortunate to have shown you this
not-so-beautiful expression.

...Is that so? I get the picture. But fear not, for I shall
lend a hand.
I appreciate it... and I'm sorry for the trouble.

We'll need your help as well. Apparently, there are a good
number of knights out there.
Let us save them together.
{next}Sure. I'm willing to help.
{next}How are we going to save them?
{next}What were you doing here?

I knew you had a strong heart. It is very impressive of you
to agree right away.

I did not want to make this decision, but... I am afraid we
must defeat them.

There was one more restaurant I wanted to try, so I was on
my way back to Akihabara.

The Knight Corps must have glitched because of the firewall
of this world.

It is hard to say this, but... we must defeat them and
return them to their souls.

I also thought of that particular method, but was hoping it 
wouldn't come to that.

...It cannot be helped. They are suffering as well. We must
deal with them quickly.

Digimon can be reborn from their souls. Sooner or later, you
will see them again.
...Yes. You're right.

Very well... My mind is made up. We must save them as soon
as possible.

They were your precious subordinates. You must take care of
them yourself.
Naturally, we will help you, too.

You have my gratitude. Kentaurosmon aside, I never expected to be 
thanking a human.
All right, then... Here we go!

That one seems to be the last. But he looks different from
the others.
Lobomon... He's one of the most noble knights in my corps!

It must be quite formidable, then. We shall fight when you
are ready.

Lobomon was the last of all the knights. It looks like
things are under control now.
My knights, I am truly sorry... Forgive me...

Now, let us head for the rendezvous point. We have no
time to waste.

You're right. It would not be beautiful to wander about any
longer.

I'll take the Knight Corps along with me in my heart as we
head to the rendezvous point.
We were able to save everyone promptly, thanks to you.

Your strength deserves to be praised. It was absolutely
beautiful.
I'll be sure to repay this debt one day. See you around.
Now, let us go defeat the Knight Corps!
